programme.title: The Devil Between Us Ep10
programme.desc: A mysterious new drug vanishes in a small town. Detective Hu Wen Jing dives into danger, Cheng Ken risks all for his daughter, Li Xiao Ya fights to escape, and Wang Ping sinks deeper into drugs.

programme.title: The Devil Between Us Ep11
programme.desc: A mysterious new drug vanishes in a small town. Detective Hu Wen Jing dives into danger, Cheng Ken risks all for his daughter, Li Xiao Ya fights to escape, and Wang Ping sinks deeper into drugs.

programme.title: Our Dazzling Days Ep14
programme.desc: Orphan Zhang Xiao Man grows up in the factory town alongside Yan Xiao Dan and Xia Lei, navigating friendship, first love, and challenges, as they pursue dreams amid the factories' decline.

programme.title: Our Dazzling Days Ep15
programme.desc: Orphan Zhang Xiao Man grows up in the factory town alongside Yan Xiao Dan and Xia Lei, navigating friendship, first love, and challenges, as they pursue dreams amid the factories' decline.

programme.title: Love Between Fairy And Devil 2 [Animation] Ep23
programme.desc: After the great battle, Dong Fang Qing Cang returns to Cangyan Sea but falls into a trap. Meanwhile, the war god Chidi keeps mysteriously appearing in Xiao Lan Hua's dreams.

programme.title: Love Between Fairy And Devil 2 [Animation] Ep24
programme.desc: After the great battle, Dong Fang Qing Cang returns to Cangyan Sea but falls into a trap. Meanwhile, the war god Chidi keeps mysteriously appearing in Xiao Lan Hua's dreams.

programme.title: Love Between Fairy And Devil 2 [Animation] Ep25
programme.desc: After the great battle, Dong Fang Qing Cang returns to Cangyan Sea but falls into a trap. Meanwhile, the war god Chidi keeps mysteriously appearing in Xiao Lan Hua's dreams.

programme.title: Love Between Fairy And Devil 2 [Animation] Ep26
programme.desc: After the great battle, Dong Fang Qing Cang returns to Cangyan Sea but falls into a trap. Meanwhile, the war god Chidi keeps mysteriously appearing in Xiao Lan Hua's dreams.

programme.title: Paws & Palaces Ep01
programme.desc: Six special palace cats form the "Forbidden Cat Squad," guarding the precious relics of "Wu Hua." Clever & brave, they defeat the villainous Black Owl, restoring order to the world.

programme.title: Paws & Palaces Ep02
programme.desc: Six special palace cats form the "Forbidden Cat Squad," guarding the precious relics of "Wu Hua." Clever & brave, they defeat the villainous Black Owl, restoring order to the world.

programme.title: Detective Chinatown 2 Ep03
programme.desc: Produced by Chen Si Cheng, this suspenseful detective drama features Roy Chiu, Shang Yu Xian and others in four thrilling storylines exploring urban mysteries.

programme.title: Detective Chinatown 2 Ep04
programme.desc: Produced by Chen Si Cheng, this suspenseful detective drama features Roy Chiu, Shang Yu Xian and others in four thrilling storylines exploring urban mysteries.

programme.title: Peak Confrontation
programme.desc: Gangster Chu Tian Kuo involuntarily participates in a competition to win the golden mask. But during the struggle for the mask, he is framed & subsequently rescued by the princess of a foreign tribe.

programme.title: Huang Jin Gui Shi Lu Film Series
programme.desc: With the influential sects at the brink of war, County Chief Lu instructs Chief Detective Duan Guang Long & siblings, Xue Xiao Feng & Xue Xiao Hua, to conduct a secret investigation on the matter.

programme.title: Shuigui Bride
programme.desc: On a stormy night, 8 people gather in a dilapidated temple to take shelter from the rain. They begin discussing the legend of the Water Ghost Bride, kick-starting a series of mysterious murders.

programme.title: The Deadly Pursuer
programme.desc: While police captain Fang Yu is leading murder investigation at a forest farm in Long'an City, auxiliary police officer Cui Xiao Tian, who is investigating a hit-&-run, also becomes embroiled in it.

programme.title: Mi Wu Ci Sha
programme.desc: The daughter of a late great general embarks on a journey for revenge when she discovers that the mastermind to the murder of her biological father is her foster father, the Prime Minister.

programme.title: The Chi Dragon Slash
programme.desc: At the end of the Tang Dynasty, Navy General Qian Liu set off to exterminate the river pirates, only to discover a mystical two-headed beast called the Chi dragon in a cave.

programme.title: A Love Never Lost Ep35
programme.desc: Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.

programme.title: A Love Never Lost Ep36
programme.desc: Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.

programme.title: Blade Of Fury
programme.desc: Pei Xing is famous for being an 'unkillable' & cold-blooded assassin. But after witnessing great injustice, his dormant chivalry gradually awakens and he decides to retaliate in kind.

programme.title: The King Rise Again
programme.desc: During the struggle for the dragon throne, the Empress reveals that the Emperor has a hidden son. She appoints Man Shu to find the one who would be the true heir to the throne.

programme.title: Fox Demon Legend
programme.desc: Girls vanish in a remote village. Li Chang Xiao hunts for his missing disciple Luo Shui, uncovering fox legends, deadly secrets and a dark twisting conspiracy.

programme.title: Ghost Mantis 2 Mutation
programme.desc: Entomologist Su Hao is kidnapped & forced to participate in splicing experiments. To halt the inhumane experiments, Su Hao fights in a life-and-death battle against the demonic leader.

programme.title: The Hero
programme.desc: Dong Lu is kicked out by his wife & becomes a basement manager through the introduction of his ex-classmate. His interest is peaked when he learns that there is hidden treasure in the basement.

programme.title: Wild Agent 2: Peach Assassination
programme.desc: To invade the global financial system, a criminal organization kidnaps AI expert Fang Li. His wife, Ya Mei, a retired former ATO agent, rejoins the organization to rescue her husband.

programme.title: Treasure Hunting Of The Dragon In Shanghai Beach
programme.desc: At end of the 19th century, patriot hero Liang Chao entrusted his closest friend Li Tian Feng with the secrets to a hidden treasure, urging Li to unearth the treasure for the sake of the nation.

programme.title: Lost Destiny
programme.desc: While journeying to take the imperial exam, scholar Pu Song Ling meets Su Xian, a nine-tailed fox spirit indebted to his kindness in their previous life.

programme.title: Detective Chinatown 2 Ep05
programme.desc: Produced by Chen Si Cheng, this suspenseful detective drama features Roy Chiu, Shang Yu Xian and others in four thrilling storylines exploring urban mysteries.

programme.title: Detective Chinatown 2 Ep06
programme.desc: Produced by Chen Si Cheng, this suspenseful detective drama features Roy Chiu, Shang Yu Xian and others in four thrilling storylines exploring urban mysteries.

programme.title: The Legend Of Feng Lou: Divine Fox
programme.desc: The grandfather of a human girl is killed after offending a fox fairy in the mountains. Years later, the girl marries Feng Lou, the murderer who killed her grandfather, in an attempt to take revenge.

programme.title: The Cursed Village
programme.desc: On their wedding night, Liu Jin is killed and Shen Xiu Xiu assaulted. Soon, men in Fengming Village die mysteriously in bridal attire. Chu Qi & Xu Yi Ming search for her sister and uncover the truth.

programme.title: Mrs. Golden Snake
programme.desc: The Sword Sect faces Lady Golden Snake's revival after her seal breaks. Demon Qu Ling and disciple Bian Xiaoya unite to reclaim the sword and seal her.

programme.title: Red Land
programme.desc: Humans battle underground mutants "Headhunters" and the "Cave Tribe," fighting to survive and reclaim their home on the dangerous, resource-scarce surface.

programme.title: Shell Girl
programme.desc: Upon waking up in a laboratory, a girl finds that she has gained superior fighting skills but lost her memory. Hunted by an unknown man, she has to save herself & rediscover her identity.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.

programme.title: A Love Never Lost Ep37
programme.desc: Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.

programme.title: A Love Never Lost Ep38
programme.desc: Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.

programme.title: Desert Lone Hero
programme.desc: The fight for a mystical treasure begins after the death of Shen Shijie, the world's richest businessman, who built an impenetrable vault to seal up his huge wealth.

programme.title: Drug Storm
programme.desc: Vice-captain Xiao Ruolan falls into a trap at the border. Her substitute joins the police to fight Chen Qiang. Real vs fake, bullets fly—who will survive and have the last laugh?

programme.title: The Legend Of Man And Loong
programme.desc: The Huan Long family has lived with & fought alongside dragons since ancient times. However, after a betrayal, all the dragon kings were sealed into the Nine Dragon Wall.

programme.title: Mistery Of Error
programme.desc: Under siege from the feudal lords, emperor Zhou Su Wen relies on a special technique to transform himself in order to survive. Living in the village, he learns the meaning of responsibility & justice.
